name: Bandit
description: Bandit is a fast-paced card game blending memory, bluffing, and quick reflexes. Each player starts with a 2x2 grid of four face-down cards but only knows two of them, then on their turn draws from the deck or discard and either uses the card's power (peek, swap, mess with an opponent's layout) or swaps it into their grid to lower their hidden score. Match the top discard's value at any time and you can slam your card down to ditch it — but miss and you take a penalty card. When you think you have the lowest score, declare "Bandit!" to trigger the final round: right earns -10 points, wrong earns +10. First to 100 points ends the game; lowest total wins.
